chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 481 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2162/2021 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.11.2022 Petitioner Kareemuddin Abbasi, present in person Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents 3 to 7 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks declaration that the act of respondents for stopping his monthly salaries is illegal, malafide, null, void and without any lawful authority and justification. He also seeks releasing of his monthly salaries. It is claim of the petitioner that on 04.04.2018, he was appointed as Naib Qasid in Sukkur Municipal Corporation, Sukkur in accordance with law and posted in Tax / Octroi branch of Sukkur Municipal Corporation. It is case of the petitioner that he has performed his duties, however, the related staff demanded illegal gratification to release his monthly salaries. In response comments have been filed on behalf of respondents 4, 5 and 7, wherein it has been stated that the aforesaid office order for appointment and posting of the petitioner is baseless, forged, manipulated by the then Bill Clerk of Tax / Octroi Branch, namely, Syed Zahid Hussain Shah and the petitioner. It has further been stated that vide order dated 04.04.2018 various Municipal employees were engaged in Computerize Water Billing Section for issuing of Water Recovery Bills for the year 2017-2018 in which various contractual status employees were repatriated from North Sindh Urban Services Corporation (NSUSC), Sukkur management to Sukkur Municipal Corporation due to winding up of NSUSC, Sukkur deployed, causing which with the regular Municipal Employees and other Contractual Employees were also engaged in above

In response comments have been filed on behalf of respondents 4, 5 and 7, wherein it has been stated that the aforesaid office order for appointment and posting of the petitioner is baseless, forged, manipulated by the then Bill Clerk of Tax / Octroi Branch, namely, Syed Zahid Hussain Shah and the petitioner. It has further been stated that vide order dated 04.04.2018 various Municipal employees were engaged in Computerize Water Billing Section for issuing of Water Recovery Bills for the year 2017-2018 in which various contractual status employees were repatriated from North Sindh Urban Services Corporation (NSUSC), Sukkur management to Sukkur Municipal Corporation due to winding up of NSUSC, Sukkur deployed, causing which with the regular Municipal Employees and other Contractual Employees were also engaged in above Page 2 of 2 said letter, due to this, the petitioner took illegal benefit with the tactics of malafide intention between the then Bill Clerk of Tax / Octroi Branch, namely, Syed Zahid Hussain Shah and illegally managed his name in the above said engagement office order, so also, the then Bill Clerk managed the name of petitioner in the Muster Roll of Tax / Octroi Branch, therefore, the administration has taken serious action against the then Bill Clerk Syed Zahid Hussain Shah and he is suspended. It has been reiterated that the presence marking of the petitioner w.e.f. 01.04.2018 to 30.09.2018 is available however, the petitioner is not the employee of the Corporation. Since the very appointment of the petitioner has been declared by respondents 4, 5 and 7 as forged manipulated. He has failed to prove his right for the relief he claimed; hence, this petition being devoid of merits is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
